# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing architecture.

Resources:
  SQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MyEventQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600  # 4 days in seconds
      VisibilityTimeout: 30  # 30 seconds

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: MyEventTopic

  SQSQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - SQS:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                AWS:SourceArn: !Ref SNSTopic

  Subscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic

Outputs:
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: "URL of the created SQS Queue"
    Value: !Ref SQSQueue

  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: "ARN of the created SNS Topic"
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
